memory_entries.text: In this SQLite product benchmark, tables are grouped by suffix: g1 is mostly Office Products (items_g1 main_cat Office Products 13933/20000), g2 is electronics (items_g2 dominated by Computers/All Electronics/Camera), and g3 is Musical Instruments (items_g3 has 17162 Musical Instruments products). items tables have ref_id, ttl, ratings, price, str_nm/main_cat; attrs_g3 stores product attributes including Brand with columns ref_id, attr_key, attr_val.
